name: Prompt Cleanup

tasks.title: Remove Phase H and all git instructions from execute.md
tasks.description: Remove Phase H and all git instructions from execute.md
tasks.body: In internal/project/templates/prompts/stages/execute.md: (1) Remove the entire Phase H (Commit) section (lines 151-158 currently). (2) Remove the rule 'Commit before signaling completion' (line 199). (3) Remove the line 'You must have committed changes before emitting this' from the WOLFCASTLE_COMPLETE description (line 168). (4) Remove the 'git add .wolfcastle/' instruction added in PR #137 if any remnants exist outside Phase H. (5) Re-letter subsequent phases (I->H, J->I, K->J). (6) Search for any other git references in the file and remove them. The terminal markers and signal behavior remain unchanged; only git operations are removed.

tasks.title: Update AGENTS.md and docs/agents/ to forbid git operations
tasks.description: Update AGENTS.md and docs/agents/ to forbid git operations
tasks.body: Review AGENTS.md and all files in docs/agents/ for any guidance telling agents to commit, stage, or run git commands. Remove such guidance and replace with a clear statement: 'Agents must not run git add, git commit, or any git command. The daemon handles all git operations deterministically after each task iteration.' Also check the .wolfcastle/system/base/ copy of execute.md and ensure it matches the updated version.

tasks.title: Audit
tasks.description: Verify all work in Prompt Cleanup is complete and correct

audit_enrichment: Grep execute.md for 'git add', 'git commit', 'Phase H', and 'Commit before signaling' to confirm zero matches
